title: Implement v8.0 External Runtime Resource contract and audit
description: Implement the first bounded v8.0 slice: external-runtime-resource-record, external-resource-use-record, external-resource-audit, release-state integration for v8.0+, Mission Control projection, self-hosting evidence, and tests. Do not implement autonomous provider execution, credentials, billing, deployment, or production writes.
triage_notes: v8.0 External Runtime Resource contract, use record, audit, release-state gate, Mission Control projection, and self-hosting evidence implemented.
